NCT03762850.name: PROTECT
NCT03762850.group: Adults with primary IgA nephropathy on RAS blockade, sparsentan 400 mg vs irbesartan 300 mg (week 36 UPCR ratio interim primary; week 110 eGFR slope final)

allOutcomes.title: UPCR ratio at week 36 (sparsentan / irbesartan, geometric mean ratio; interim primary)
Confirmed eGFR slope at week 110 (sparsentan minus irbesartan; mL/min/1.73m^2/year, MD; final primary)

NCT03762850.snippet: Source: Heerspink HJL et al. Lancet 2023;401:1584-1594 (PROTECT, week 36 interim primary). Final 110-week eGFR slope reported in Heerspink 2024.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Key Inclusion Criteria for the Double-Blind Period:~* Age 18 years or older at screening~* Biopsy-proven primary IgAN~* Proteinuria of ≥1 g/day at screening~* eGFR ≥30 mL/min/1.73 m2 at screening~* Currently on stable dose of ACEI and/or ARB therapy, for at least 12 weeks prior to screening (maximum tolerated dose and at least one-half of the maximum labeled dose)~* Systolic BP ≤150 mmHg and diastolic BP ≤100 mmHg at screening~* Willing to undergo change in ACEI and/or ARB and anti-hypertensive...

title: RapidMeta Renal | Sparsentan (Dual ETA/AT1 Antagonist) in IgA Nephropathy v1.0
